name: New York Times API
what_it_does: Provides access to New York Times content including article search, top stories, most popular articles, bestseller lists, and archive data.
use_cases: News app content features powered by NYT editorial
not_for: Full article text without a NYT subscription
Real-time wire news from non-NYT sources
High-volume production scraping without enterprise agreement
best_when: Building apps that specifically feature NYT journalism, books data, or need deep historical article search.
avoid_when: You need broad multi-source news aggregation or full article body text without NYT subscription integration.

auth.notes: Single API key via query parameter; separate keys per API product in developer portal

pricing.paid_tiers: No public paid tier; enterprise arrangements available
pricing.notes: Free with registration; generous for most non-commercial use cases; commercial use requires agreement with NYT

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: JSON error responses; HTTP status codes used correctly; messages sometimes sparse
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Entirely read-only; safe to retry any request
known_agent_gotchas: 5 req/min rate limit easily exceeded by agents making parallel calls
Separate API keys required per product (Article Search, Top Stories, etc.)
Full article body not available; agents receive abstracts only
Archive API returns raw metadata that requires parsing

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced; API key in query param risks logging; no per-key scopes or read/write separation
